commentaries.author: George Leo Haydock
commentaries.content: 1 Esdras Wisdom of Solomon Wisdom of Sirach Epistle of Jeremiah Prayer of Manasseh And Samuel said, As your sword has made women childless, so shall your mother be childless among women. And Samuel cut Agag in pieces before the LORD in Gilgal. Josephus adds, by the hand of others. (Menochius) But zeal put the sword into his own hand; and he imitated the Levites and Phinees, (Exodus xxxii. ) to show Saul how preposterous had been his pity, when the Lord had spoken plainly. (Calmet) Lord, as a sort of victim, Isaias xxxiv. (Menochius).
